Prebuilt `mediaremote-adapter` artifacts vendored for NotchApp direct-download builds.

Contents:
- `mediaremote-adapter.pl`
- `MediaRemoteAdapter.framework`
- `MediaRemoteAdapterTestClient`
- `LICENSE`
- `UPSTREAM_VERSION`

These artifacts are pinned to upstream `ungive/mediaremote-adapter` tag `v0.7.2`
(`dc3ff17`) and are committed directly so app builds only need to copy them into
`WidgetRuntime/mediaremote-adapter/`.
